features: 【3-Port 67W USB-C Fast Car Charger Cigarette Lighter】: Using highly efficient components + advanced chipset perfectly compatible with iPhone/SamSung device, Our 67W USB-C Car Charger Adapter can charging three iPhone 16 simultaneously. Using original USB-C terminal and 56Ω pull-up resistor adjust voltage & current output to match connected iPhone 16, Rombica's intelligent charging tech ever charges your iPhone 16 at its fastest possible, the charging speed is directly increased by 9 times.
